description: jharkhand.gov.in is the Government of Jharkhand’s public state portal, linking departmental information, citizen services, and related state web properties. Its GIS subdomain appears to host ArcGIS-based mapping and portal services.
summary: jharkhand.gov.in exposes two likely HTTP integration surfaces on its GIS subdomain: an ArcGIS REST Services endpoint and an ArcGIS Portal Sharing REST API; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: Jharkhand State GIS ArcGIS REST Services
Jharkhand State GIS ArcGIS Portal Sharing REST API
